SuperNEMO
    Source foils
    Tracking detector
    Calorimetric walls
    Calibration system

Study of detection efficiency
    Calibration sources
        activities and other characteristics and copper frame
    Data type and selection
        explaining data from Yaroslava  
        and calibration time and other
    Calibration method
        explaining Filip's work and calibration module
        energy plots
    Design of event
        data preparation and processing, 2 walls
        scheme how events in this research look like 
            what information we need about them and why
        end_X plots (why it looks like there and ho electron did it)
        bi_sources
            new source positions
        source maps
            how looks like data for our study
            why we have such plots with white blocks
    Registration efficiency
        talk about what efficiency means and how we may measure it
        (+dead_time 0)
        geometric aspect
            geometry has main impact on efficiency
            elif's work
        main contributors of efficiency innacuracy (bi sources blocks, physics)
    Results
        Comparison theoretical and experimental values
        explanation of differences
            eps_residual
        possible categories of influence on efficiency discrepancy

Conclusions
